You are asked questions about a synthetic world. You are given NO background material — only the question itself. If you cannot know the answer, give your best guess in the required format anyway.
Answer format: for true/false questions reply with exactly one word, true or false. For list questions reply with a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Question: On day 360, list every product value X such that priority_case(product=?X, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_13, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_18) holds. Answer with a list of entity IDs (possibly empty).
Structured form: {"at_day":360,"find_slot":"product","pattern":{"relation":"rel_d301_priority_case","args":{"jurisdiction":{"const":"jurisdiction_13"},"jurisdiction2":{"const":"jurisdiction_18"},"product":{"var":"X"}}}}
